_meta.schema: core.schemas.Estimate (with line_items=list[CostLine] populated from takeoff items pre-pricing)
_meta.note_on_shape: This file uses the CostLine shape pre-populated with quantity=null/unit=TBD as a skeleton. After quantities are filled in from drawings, the estimator can price this directly via core.estimator.price_takeoff (after coercing the null quantities to floats).
_meta.facilities_contractor: SSC Services for Education (Southeast Service Corporations d/b/a)
_meta.site_address: 540 Ross Street, Harrington Tower (Bldg #0435), College Station, TX 77843
_meta.drawing_set_status: 10 sheets, Issued for Construction, dated 5/7/2026 (A0.1, A0.2 TAS, A0.3 TAS, A2.1 Floor Plans, A2.2 Ceiling Plan & Details, MEP1.0 MEP Specs, M1.1 Mech, E1.1 Elec Demo, E1.2 Elec, P1.1 Plumb)
_meta.spec_status: 308-page project manual in hand. Divisions used: 00, 01, 02, 06, 07, 09, 10, 22 (drawings), 23 (drawings), 26 (drawings). Divisions NOT USED per the spec table of contents: 03, 04, 05, 08, 11, 12, 13, 14, 21, 25, 27, 28, 31, 32, 33, 34, 44, 45.
_meta.pricing_form: Section 00 42 13 requires $ amount per CSI division actually in scope; blank divisions = not in scope but the line item still appears on the form. The expected non-zero divisions for this project are 01, 02, 06, 07, 09, 10, 22, 23, 26.
_meta.region_multiplier_note: Brazos County / TAMU College Station typically clears at ~0.93-0.96 of national RSMeans City Cost Index. Carry 1.0 until confirmed with current RSMeans CCI lookup for College Station 77843. Brazos County prevailing wage rates are in Section 00 73 50 of the spec.
_meta.contingency_pct_note: Reduced from default 10% to 7% for a single-room reno; bump back to 10% if drawings reveal extensive unknowns or if asbestos clearance comes back ambiguous.
_meta.profit_pct_note: Institutional state-work norm. Drop to 5% if VetHUB outreach is thin and we want maximum price competitiveness.
_meta.assumed_room_area_basis: Single college science classroom/lab in Harrington Tower; **MEASURE FROM A2.1 IN BLUEBEAM** before pricing. Initial 1,200 SF working assumption (could be 800–1,500 SF).
_meta.fill_instructions: Each item below has quantity=null. To fill: (1) open the corresponding drawing sheet listed under source_sheet_ids, (2) measure with Bluebeam (or equivalent), (3) replace quantity with the measured number, (4) verify unit matches the cost-DB unit (mismatches will be suppressed per CALIBRATION_REPORT v3 fix C), (5) hand-price or re-run core.estimator.price_takeoff.

line_items.description: General conditions / project supervision
line_items.notes: [TBD] Set quantity to the project duration in months (typical 2–3 mo for a single-room reno).

line_items.description: Temporary facilities and controls (dumpster, dust containment, walk-off mats, portable toilet)
line_items.notes: [TBD] 1 LS. Carry $6,500 seed; bump if TAMU dictates remote dumpster placement requiring extra haul.

line_items.description: Selective interior demolition (existing classroom/lab finishes, casework, ceiling, flooring)
line_items.notes: [TBD ~1,200 SF] Measure the room area from the demo plan. Includes finishes, casework, and ceiling tile only; structural and exterior-shell demo is not in scope.

line_items.description: Asbestos assessment + abatement allowance — per project-manual procedure (Section 02 26 23, 15 pp)
line_items.notes: [TBD: allowance $3K–$10K] The project manual includes a 15-page Asbestos Assessment spec section, which implies asbestos handling is procedurally scoped (TAMU/SSC has thought through this). Carry an allowance until Joelle confirms a clearance certificate for Lab 303.

line_items.description: Lab casework allowance — no dedicated Div 06 casework spec in project manual; see A2.1/A2.2 + H2I Sub-06 file (pending re-download)
line_items.notes: [TBD: allowance $20K–$60K] No 06 41 lab casework spec in the project manual. The H2I casework Sub-06 file posted 5/13 (pending re-download due to Zscaler block) likely carries the actual casework scope and pricing. Carry an allowance until the H2I file is retrieved and the A2.1/A2.2 casework details are reviewed.

line_items.description: Sealants — flooring transitions, fixture trims, perimeter caulking (Section 07 90 00, 5 pp)
line_items.notes: [TBD: small allowance $500–$1,500] Per Division 07 90 00 spec.

line_items.description: Wall blocking for shelving, monitor mounts, ADA grab — allowance
line_items.notes: [TBD] Small allowance — likely <100 SF of blocking total. Note seed unit is SF; if drawings call out per-mount EA, convert before pricing.

line_items.description: Doors & Windows — DIVISION NOT USED per spec table of contents; suppressed from pricing
line_items.notes: Division 08 is marked 'NOT USED' in the project manual. Existing door + frame + hardware remain. Section 00 42 13 pricing form line for Div 08 will be left blank. This row is kept for skeleton-shape parity only; suppressed=true.

line_items.description: Metal-stud framing for new / furred partitions
line_items.notes: [TBD: SF of partition face area] Likely zero if floor plan stays; non-zero if any new partition added.

line_items.description: 5/8" Type-X GWB on framing (both faces)
line_items.notes: [TBD: SF of GWB, both faces if both sides finished] Quantity = 2 × partition LF × height for both faces of any new partition.

line_items.description: Acoustical ceiling tile — 2x4 lay-in grid + tile
line_items.notes: [TBD ~1,200 SF] Full room replacement assumed; verify against reflected ceiling plan.

line_items.description: Resilient flooring — single spec line per Section 09 65 00 (5 pp); type (LVT vs sheet vinyl) per A2.1 finish plan
line_items.notes: [TBD: room area from A2.1] Spec is a single resilient-flooring section — no split between LVT and sheet vinyl in the project manual. Type identified by A2.1 finish plan. Seed cost-DB ~$6.40/SF (LVT) or $10–$14/SF allowance if sheet vinyl with heat-welded seams.

line_items.description: Resilient base — 4" rubber, integral or cove
line_items.notes: [TBD: LF of room perimeter + any casework toe-kick] Roughly room perimeter ~140 LF for a 30'x40' room.

line_items.description: Interior painting — walls + soffits + door frames (2-coat institutional latex, low-VOC)
line_items.notes: [TBD: SF of paint surface] Quantity = wall LF × ceiling height + soffit SF + door-frame allowance.

line_items.description: Room signage — ADA-compliant interior identification
line_items.notes: [TBD 1–2 EA] 'Lab 303' room sign + ADA tactile sign per TAMU wayfinding standard.

line_items.description: Tackable wall panels, marker board, AV mounting board — not in spec, confirm against A2.1; likely OFOI
line_items.notes: Not in project-manual spec. Confirm against A2.1 — most likely Owner-Furnished, Owner-Installed (OFOI). Suppressed by default; unsuppress if A2.1 shows otherwise.

line_items.description: Equipment — DIVISION NOT USED per spec table of contents; no fume hood or lab equipment in GC scope
line_items.notes: Division 11 is marked 'NOT USED' in the project manual. No lab equipment in GC scope. Section 00 42 13 pricing form line for Div 11 will be left blank.

line_items.description: Fire suppression — sprinkler-head relocation allowance (no Div 21 spec section; no FP sheets in drawings)
line_items.notes: [TBD: 4–10 head allowance @ $250–$450/EA] No Div 21 spec in project manual and no FP sheets in the 10-sheet drawing set. Handle as deferred-submittal in Technical Proposal OR allowance for existing TAMU building sprinkler vendor on T&M with EHS-coordinated shutdowns.

line_items.description: Lab sink + faucet + gooseneck spout (incl. rough-in)
line_items.notes: [TBD 1–4 EA] Lab fixture trims run $2,500–$3,500/EA installed — seed of $1,850 is light.

line_items.description: Eye-wash + safety-shower combo (plumbed)
line_items.notes: [TBD 0–1 EA] No cost-DB hit. Carry $3,500–$5,500/EA installed allowance.

line_items.description: DI water tap (if program requires)
line_items.notes: [TBD] Confirm against MEP drawings + program.

line_items.description: Lab gas / vacuum / compressed-air piping (if program requires)
line_items.notes: [TBD] Confirm against MEP drawings + program.

line_items.description: HVAC modifications — diffuser/grille relocation, VAV retrim (per M1.1 + MEP1.0)
line_items.notes: [TBD: SF served from M1.1] Spec is 'see drawings' (no separate spec section). Seed DB $22.50/SF is for ground-up RTU+duct; a single-room retrim is more like $8–$15/SF. Adjust unit_cost down at pricing time.

line_items.description: Test, adjust, balance (TAB) report
line_items.notes: [TBD 1 LS] Typical TAMU SGC requirement; $2,500–$5,000 range.

line_items.description: Lighting — LED fixture replacement
line_items.notes: [TBD: count from RCP] Typical 1 fixture per 75 SF → ~16 fixtures for 1,200 SF.

line_items.description: Branch wiring + devices (receptacles, switches, controls)
line_items.notes: [TBD ~1,200 SF] Includes dedicated 20A circuits at lab benches, GFCI within 6' of sinks, classroom occupancy / daylight / dimming controls.

line_items.description: Sub-panel for lab loads (if heavy equipment)
line_items.notes: [TBD 0–1 EA] Carry $4,500–$7,000/EA for a real lab sub-panel; seed DB 26 24 16 ($2,400) is residential-spec.

line_items.description: Low-voltage pathway — data, AV (conduit, J-boxes, ring & string)
line_items.notes: [TBD: # outlets] TAMU Tech Services furnishes cable + termination; GC scope = pathway only.

line_items.description: Fire-alarm device relocation — handle as T&M via existing TAMU FA vendor (Div 28 not in project manual)
line_items.notes: [TBD: allowance — 2–4 devices @ $350–$650 each] No Div 28 spec in project manual. Coordinate shutdown with TAMU EHS and use the building's existing FA vendor on T&M.

_unsuppressed_summary.note: Subtotal / contingency / overhead / profit / grand_total all currently $0 because every line is at quantity=null and unit_cost=0. Once quantities are filled and the cost-DB lookup runs, the model_dump shape will match exports/calibration_v3/estimate.json.
